a:s.a:s: // Colorectal diagnoses, procedures, and observations valueset "COLORECTAL CANCER": 'http://cts.nlm.nih.gov/fhir/ValueSet/2.16.840.1.113883.3.464.1003.108.12.1001'

code "FAMILIAL COLORECTAL CANCER TYPE X": '1197359006' from

def.name: FAMILY HISTORY OF POTENTIALLY PRECANCEROUS POLYPS
def.display: Family history of polyp of colon (situation)

a:s.a:s: code "FAMILY HISTORY OF POTENTIALLY PRECANCEROUS POLYPS": '429969003' from
display 'Family history of polyp of colon (situation)'

def.name: HISTORY OF COLORECTAL CANCER
def.display: History of malignant neoplasm of cecum and/or colon and/or rectum (situation)

a:s.a:s: display 'History of malignant neoplasm of cecum and/or colon and/or rectum (situation)'

def.name: FAMILY HISTORY OF COLORECTAL CANCER
def.display: Family history of cancer of colon (situation)

a:s.a:s: code "FAMILY HISTORY OF COLORECTAL CANCER": '312824007' from
display 'Family history of cancer of colon (situation)'
// Non-standard or "local" codes code "New or worsening colorectal symptoms": 'ColorectalSymptoms' from
define function ValuesFromObservation(D DiagnosticReport, ObsList List<Observation>):

operand.name: FAMILY HISTORY OF POTENTIALLY PRECANCEROUS POLYPS

a:s.a:s:

define PotentiallyPrecancerousPolypsConditions:
